base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fds_menu_save_load — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 metroid. Famicom Disk System menu — save/load slots (FDS had battery-backed save via 3.5" floppy, unlike NES password-only). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Famicom Disk System menu — save/load slots (FDS had battery-backed save via 3.5" floppy, unlike NES password-only)
